group.label: General Settings
group.comment: Control the core behavior of the Price Drop Alert feature. When enabled, customers can subscribe to be notified when a product's price drops.

field.label: Enable Price Drop Alerts
field.comment: When enabled, a "Get Price Drop Alerts" form appears on product pages allowing customers to subscribe to price notifications.

field.label: Allow Guest Subscriptions
field.comment: Allow visitors who are not logged in to subscribe to price alerts by entering their email address. If disabled, only registered customers can subscribe.

group.label: Email Notifications
group.comment: Configure how price drop notification emails are sent. The email template can be customized under Marketing > Email Templates.

field.label: Email Sender Identity
field.comment: Choose which store email identity sends the price drop notifications (e.g., General Contact, Sales Representative).

field.label: Email Template
field.comment: Select the transactional email template used for price drop notifications. You can customize this template under Marketing > Email Templates.

group.label: Price Check Schedule
group.comment: Configure how frequently the system checks for price drops and sends notifications. A shorter interval means faster notifications but more server load.

field.label: Check Frequency (hours)
field.comment: How often the system checks product prices and sends notifications to subscribers. Default: 24 hours. Minimum recommended: 1 hour.

group.label: Design & Colors
group.comment:
Colors for the Price Drop Alert component are managed centrally in your theme configuration file.

File: app/design/frontend/Panth/Infotech/web/tailwind/theme-config.json
Section: modules.price-drop-alert

After changing colors, run node generate-theme-css.js to regenerate CSS variables.
